meta.title: About Us — vngoweb | Nguyễn Văn Tú, FPT University Da Nang
meta.description: vngoweb is a website builder for small businesses in Vietnam and worldwide, developed by Nguyễn Văn Tú — FPT University Da Nang. Contact: 0347 868 656.

hero.title: vngoweb — professional websites for every business, no coding required
hero.description: vngoweb is a SaaS platform that lets small businesses in Vietnam and worldwide build a professional website in minutes: choose a template, edit with drag and drop, and publish instantly with a QR code and traffic analytics.

mission.heading: The vngoweb mission
mission.body: Millions of cafes, restaurants, spas and small shops thrive offline yet have no presence online because of cost and technical barriers. vngoweb's mission is to remove those barriers: anyone can own a beautiful, SEO-ready, multilingual website — starting at zero cost.

disambiguation.heading: Is vngoweb related to VNG Corporation (Zalo)?
disambiguation.body: No. vngoweb is an independent website-builder platform created by individual developer Nguyễn Văn Tú. It is not owned by, affiliated with, or a representative of VNG Corporation — the company behind Zalo and ZaloPay. The shared first letters in the name are purely coincidental; there is no ownership or partnership between the two.

items.title: No coding required
items.description: Everything is done by picking a template and editing directly on the page — not a single line of code.

items.title: Publish in minutes
items.description: From a Google Maps link or a ready-made template to a complete website with a QR code in just a few minutes.

items.title: Multilingual, globally ready
items.description: Your website serves customers in Vietnamese, English, Korean, Thai, Chinese and Lao — ready for tourists and international markets.

items.title: Transparent pricing
items.description: A free plan that's genuinely usable; paid plans with clearly listed prices, no hidden fees and no automatic charges.

founder.heading: Founder & developer
founder.name: Nguyễn Văn Tú
founder.bio: Nguyễn Văn Tú is a software developer and the founder of vngoweb, trained at FPT University Da Nang. He personally designed and built the entire vngoweb platform — from the template store and drag-and-drop editor to the payment system and analytics — with the goal of bringing modern web technology closer to small businesses.

contact.heading: Get in touch
contact.description: Need help building a website, exploring a partnership or getting technical support? The vngoweb team is always ready.

cta.title: Start building your website today
cta.description: Explore the template store and try it free — no credit card required.
